title: Om Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Om Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
